mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customer SET open_id = #{openId}, nickname = #{nickname}, sex = IFNULL(#{sex}, '未知'), photo = IFNULL(#{photo}, ''), tel = IFNULL(#{tel}, ''), `status` = 1
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id FROM tb_customer WHERE `status` != 2 AND tel = #{tel} AND tel != '' LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id FROM tb_customer WHERE `status` != 2 AND open_id = #{openId}
SELECT IF(sex = '男', '先生', '女士') AS title, tel, photo FROM tb_customer WHERE id = #{customerId}
SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, sex, tel FROM tb_customer WHERE id = #{customerId}
